preheader_text: The Interaction Deep Dive in CQA: audit scores, verify AI decisions, and prep for coaching conversations.
headline: Meet the Interaction Deep Dive
subheadline: Audit scores, verify AI decisions, and prep coaching — all from one screen.
hero_image_alt: Interaction Deep Dive preview showing a call recording and quality profile
intro_html: As a supervisor, you already use the Analysis List in CQA to track your team's call quality. But the real power is in the Interaction Deep Dive — the detail view behind every scored call. This is where you audit scores, verify AI decisions, and prepare for targeted coaching conversations.
section_heading: What can you do with the Interaction Deep Dive?
step_1_description: Play the full call directly in the platform without downloading, so you can hear exactly what happened.
step_2_description: Review the complete conversation in text, so you can follow along with what was discussed.
step_3_description: See scores broken down by category and sub-category, expand any section to verify individual KPI results across your team's calls.
step_4_description: Click any KPI to see the evidence and logic the AI used for its pass/fail decision — essential for resolving disputes and validating scores.
step_5_description: When an agent raises a dispute, use the transcript and AI reasoning side-by-side to accept or reject with confidence.
cta_description: Watch the training and navigate the CQA platform on your HSL LMS platform.
footer_disclaimer: You received this email because you are the CQA supervisor.
